name: Idle Hacking: An Inaction RPG
short_description: A persistent idle MMORPG, with a text-based hacking theme. Enjoy the "Inaction RPG" design philosophy by crafting equpiment using ARPG influenced prefix/suffix systems, build or join player managed syndicates, trade on the marketplace, and compete in community events.
detailed_description:
Upgrade your hacking prowess in this unique "Inaction" RPG/MMORPG.  Optimize your build by engaging with the dozens of stats and over 100 different affixes that can appear on gear.  Try to find the ultimate "Signature Affix" item providing unique gameplay mechanics and enabling builds that utilize unorthodox stat combinations.

Join or start your own Syndicate with other players, sharing resources and creating powerful boost mechanics to empower your hacking and gathering activities.

Participate in multiple daily community boss events where players fight against a world boss, while others provide support to the combatants to push for new records and powerful temporary buffs based on how many levels of the event are completed.

Enjoy the ability to keep making progress while away, as your character will continue to hack virtual opponents and gather additional resources for up to 12 hours after logging out.

reviews.review_text: I prefer text over kiddie pixel sprites for idle games any day. + Tech themed? I'm in.

If you're a fan of PBBGs it's a wonderful game.
Dev's very present and quick to respond to concerns and explain things you may have questions about.
Overall wonderful experience.
